query: SELECT id, projectId, taskId, taskGroup, dependencyId, requirementId, deliverableId, description, responsible, responsibleId, accountable, accountableId, informed, informedId, consulted, consultedId, dueDate, assignDate, currentStatus, statusUpdate, owner, ownerId, status, priority, lastUpdate, updateDate, importedAt, updatedAt FROM tasks WHERE projectId = 2 ORDER BY taskId LIMIT 5;
